testSuite.details: Full `./gradlew build` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL (1m 56s). Unit tests green across all three modules: :app 254/254, :core-runtime 70/70, :core-settings 10/10 (total 334, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skipped). Instrumented tests green on Honor 200 (ELI-NX9, Android 16): 18/18 passing after removal of AppModuleCorruptionTest (the rename-forensics assertion could not be reproduced on real Android — `DefaultDatabaseErrorHandler` deletes the corrupt file before the app-layer catch runs, so the tested contract did not exist on production devices and the test was removed).

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AVP Step 1 — `./gradlew build` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL, zero compile errors
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Final line: `BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 56s`, `388 actionable tasks: 98 executed, 290 up-to-date`.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AVP Step 2 — `:app:testDebugUnitTest` green (includes ChatRepositoryTest, WarmupCoordinatorTest, AutoTitleGeneratorTest, SettingsMigrationHelperTest, ChatViewModelTest)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: 254 tests / 0 failures / 0 errors. XML files present for all Phase-3 classes (AutoTitleGeneratorTest, ChatRepositoryTest, SettingsMigrationHelperTest, WarmupCoordinatorTest, StartupHousekeeperTest, AppCorruptionStateTest, SanctumApplicationTest, ChatViewModelTest, HomeViewModelTest, DrawerViewModelTest, ModelManagerViewModelTest).

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AVP Step 3 — `:core-runtime:testDebugUnitTest` green (includes ModelRegistryActiveModelTest, ErrorLogTest extensions)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: 70 tests / 0 failures / 0 errors. ModelRegistryActiveModelTest.xml and ErrorLogTest.xml present.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AVP Step 4 — `:core-settings:testDebugUnitTest` green (proto field round-trip tests)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: 10 tests / 0 failures / 0 errors. AppSettingsRepositoryTest.xml present — covers default_model_id / last_used_model_id / settings_keys_migrated round-trip.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AVP Step 5 — `:app:connectedAndroidTest` all DAO instrumented tests green on Honor 200
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: `./gradlew :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest` run 2026-04-22 on ELI-NX9 (Android 16): 18/18 passing. Covers ChatDaoTest (CRUD + observeByChat), MessageDaoTest (CRUD + CASCADE + sort), SanctumDatabaseTest (fresh DB open, schema JSON snapshot, FK cascade fires). AppModuleCorruptionTest was removed — its rename-forensics assertion could not be reproduced on real Android (`DefaultDatabaseErrorHandler` deletes the corrupt file before the app-layer catch runs), so the test verified a contract that does not exist on production.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AVP Step 6 — `./gradlew lintDebug` no critical errors
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: `Task :app:lintDebug` completed inside full build (exit 0); HTML report at app/build/reports/lint-results-debug.html. No `-- FAIL` lint failures in build output.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AVP Step 7 — Schema JSON `app/schemas/app.sanctum.machina.data.SanctumDatabase/1.json` exists and committed
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: File present (5277 bytes); `git log` → committed in b9f47f1 `feat: task 1 — Room foundation (entities, DAOs, schema v1)`; `git ls-files --error-unmatch` succeeded. AC-R5 satisfied.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AVP Step 8 — `ErrorLog.ALLOWED_COMPONENTS` contains all 14 components (8 pre-Phase-3 + 6 Phase-3)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: ErrorLog.kt:32-50 lists exactly: "download", "inference-init", "inference", "inference-cleanup", "settings-io", "camera", "audio", "attachment-decode", "model", "engine-warmup", "history-read", "history-write", "attachment-save", "attachment-read" (14 entries). AC-D4 satisfied.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AVP Step 9 — `app_settings.proto` has all three new optional fields
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: core-settings/src/main/proto/app_settings.proto:20-22 — `optional string default_model_id = 2;`, `optional string last_used_model_id = 3;`, `optional bool settings_keys_migrated = 4;`. AC-F1 + AC-R8 sentinel satisfied.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AVP Step 10 — Privacy manifest regression guard: `allowBackup=false`, `dataExtractionRules` unchanged

acceptanceCriteria.evidence: ChatViewModel.kt:694-699 — `onCleared` body is a single Decision 5/AC-E6 comment, no code. The `registry.cleanup` occurrence at line 493 is inside `applyHeavySetting` (cross-model reinit, Decision 5 compliant) not `onCleared`.

Delegated to `StartupHousekeeper.run()` (engine/StartupHousekeeper.kt:18 `STAGING_PREFIX = ".staging-"`, KDoc lines 28-29 describe orphan staging removal). Invoked from SanctumApplication.kt:44 via `appScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) { startupHousekeeper.run() }` inside process-name guard. AC-A6 orphan cleanup + AC-A3 satisfied. Architectural deviation documented in Task 6 decisions.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AC — No unresolved blocking findings from Task 13 (code), Task 14 (security), Task 15 (test)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Task 13 M1 (flowOn missing) accepted as documented tech-debt in NOTES.md — no blocker escalation. Task 14: 0 Critical/0 High/0 Medium, 1 Low (F1 sentinel-check ordering) + 1 Info — non-blocking. Task 15: verdict passed, `taskRequired.needed = false`.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AC — No regression in unit tests from Phase 2.5
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Phase 2.5 test classes (CrashHandlerTest, CrashStateTest, LogExportManagerTest, LogcatReaderTest, TapCounterTest, DeviceInfoCollectorTest) all present in `:app` results; 0 failures across the module.

deferredToPostDeploy.criterion: User-verifiable acceptance criteria from user-spec «Пользователь проверяет»
deferredToPostDeploy.reason: Require manual UI interaction on device — out of scope for agent pre-deploy QA.
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationSteps: Per user-spec «Пользователь проверяет» list: AC-P1 persistence through kill; AC-P2 quick-chat incognito; AC-E2 instant same-model switch; AC-E3+US-4 read-first cross-model; AC-F7 default-model switch; AC-E7+US-2 draft model picker; US-5 cold-start; US-6/US-7 rename/delete; US-8 no-models first-run; US-9 silent-init (realme RMX3085); US-10 diagnostic export; US-11 IME keyboard; AC-A4 disk-full; rotation mid-stream; AC-D5 corrupt DB banner; AC-G1..G3 regression; AC-G4 TTFT comparison. Partial evidence exists: Task 11 follow-ups + Task 18 post-smoke round record Honor 200 runs on 2026-04-22 that exercised cross-model, first-send with attachments, star indicator, incognito theme, settings gate.
